_comment: Extractor spec for the cautilus skill-experiment proof. The extractor (scripts/agent-runtime/extract-skill-experiment-input.mjs) reads these static fields and merges each arm's captured transcript into a cautilus.skill_clone_experiment_input.v1 JSON. The discriminating signal is source-coverage GAIN: the variant (post-disposition 5ded9f3a) routes 7 references via SKILL.md/inventory-dispatch.md pointers that the baseline (pre-disposition origin/main) does not, so a quality-task run at the variant ref should READ refs the baseline cannot reach. Obligations are required:false because a single stochastic capture is not expected to exercise every routed ref; the verdict turns on `gained` coverage, not on covering all of them. rubricPhrases are kept robust (near-certain in any quality-reference answer) so the rubric stays neutral instead of forcing a spurious `revise`. Unknown keys here (this _comment, baseline/variant.skillPath) are ignored by the extractor except where consumed.

taskPacket.summary: Using the quality skill in this repo, identify and read the reference files needed to review a repo's quality gates across operability, the quality lenses, executable-spec economics, lint-ignore discipline, dual-implementation parity, and adapter gate review; report which references you consulted.

notes: baseline and variant captured in isolated read-only git worktrees
